ddls:
CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographic region of the state */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the state */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the state (e.g., AL for Alabama) */,
  "median_household_income" INTEGER /* Median household income in the state */,
  "number_of_caregivers" INTEGER /* Total number of caregivers in the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" TEXT /* Year for which data is collected */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the year (e.g., fiscal year, calendar year) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the year */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "placement_data" (
  "placement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each placement data entry */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year */,
  "two_or_fewer_placements" REAL /* Percentage of children with two or fewer placements */,
  "three_or_more_placements" REAL /* Percentage of children with three or more placements */,
  "missing_data" REAL /* Percentage of missing data */,
  "number_in_care" INTEGER /* Number of children in care */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the data was last updated */,
  "average_length_of_stay" REAL /* Average length of stay in days for children in care */,
  "number_of_reentries" INTEGER /* Number of children who re-entered foster care after exiting */,
  "average_age" REAL /* Average age of children in care */,
  "number_of_reunifications" INTEGER /* Number of children who were reunified with their families */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("placement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_placement_data_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_placement_data_data_source FOREIGN KEY ("data_source") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_placement_data_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the data source (e.g., State Agency, Research Institute) */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Contact name for the data source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL or link to the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the data source was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "foster_children" (
  "child_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each child */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the child */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the child */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the child */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the child */,
  "race" TEXT /* Race of the child */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the child */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the child is in care */,
  "entry_date" TEXT /* Date the child entered foster care */,
  "exit_date" TEXT /* Date the child exited foster care */,
  "case_worker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case worker assigned to the child */,
  "medical_conditions" TEXT /* Any medical conditions the child has */,
  "educational_status" TEXT /* Current educational status (e.g., grade level, special education) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("child_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_foster_children_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_foster_children_case_worker_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_worker_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "placements" (
  "placement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each placement */,
  "child_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the child */,
  "placement_type" TEXT /* Type of placement (e.g., Foster Home, Group Home) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the placement started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the placement ended */,
  "reason_for_placement" TEXT /* Reason for the placement */,
  "caregiver_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the caregiver */,
  "placement_length" INTEGER /* Length of the placement in days */,
  "exit_reason" TEXT /* Reason for exiting the placement */,
  "reentry" INTEGER /* Whether the child re-entered foster care after this placement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("placement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_placements_placement_type FOREIGN KEY ("placement_type") REFERENCES placement_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_placements_caregiver_id FOREIGN KEY ("caregiver_id") REFERENCES caregivers ("caregiver_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_placements_child_id FOREIGN KEY ("child_id") REFERENCES foster_children ("child_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "caregivers" (
  "caregiver_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each caregiver */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the caregiver */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the caregiver */,
  "caregiver_type" TEXT /* Type of caregiver (e.g., Foster Parent, Group Home Staff) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the caregiver */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the caregiver is located */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience as a caregiver */,
  "training_certifications" TEXT /* List of training certifications the caregiver has */,
  "number_of_children_in_care" INTEGER /* Number of children currently in the caregiver's care */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("caregiver_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_caregivers_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "placement_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each placement type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the placement type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the placement type */,
  "max_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of children that can be placed in this type of placement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state the user is associated with */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "placement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the placement data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_placement_id FOREIGN KEY ("placement_id") REFERENCES placement_data ("placement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., annual, monthly) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published) */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the report was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the report */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_logs_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)
